title: Welcome to Aastha Hospital
text:
Welcome to Aastha Hospital Welcome to Aastha Hospital & Godsend IVF Centre Emergency Call (+91) 9250913363 Home About Us OUR SPECIALITIES OUR FACILITIES CENTRE OF EXCELLENCE OTHER SERVICES Doctors Events contact Welcome to our Hospital About AASTHA HOSPITAL Aastha Hospital is a state-of-the-art Multi Speciality facility with advance technology over 50 beds providing quality healthcare services in first phase. Hospital is the most promising facility to the community of surroundings since its inception.
Modern infrastructure complying all statutory, safety guidelines and fulfilling quality standards as per NABH. Aastha Hospital has started its journey in January, 2008 with an honest and a focused vision to meet the need of community of surroundings. In a very short span of time, the hospital has become the prime tertiary healthcare Centre and recognised as one of the best healthcare facility in the West region of Delhi. OUR BOARD OF DIRECTORS More Make an Appointment Book Appointment Now Why Choose Us To provide compassionate, caring health services with the help of qualified & experienced doctors, professionals and latest technology. Committed to achieve the best patient satisfaction by providing all ethical and quality healthcare services at affordable cost. Qualified Doctors Hospital has highly qualified and skilled medical professionals in various specialties. Affordable Cost we provide Quality Health Care Services at the most affordable cost. Personalized Care We do believe in personalized Care. HOSPITAL INFRASTRUCTURE Provide all OPD & emergency services, life saving, therapeutic and curative secondary care. Our Services Mother & Childcare Painless delivery, laparoscopic surgeries with Fully equipped NICU. IVF & Infertility Treatment one of the best healthcare facility in the West region of Delhi. Orthopaedics & Joint Replacement Specialty is concerned with Joint Replacement (HIP & KNEE) & correction of deformities Laparoscopic & Bariatric minimally invasive laparoscopic surgeries including Cholecystectomy, Appendectomy and bariatric etc. Trauma & Neurosurgery Neurological procedures like Brain, Spine Surgery and Brain Tumour Removal. Nephrology & Urology Wide range of treatment options in the field of Nephrology and Urology. All Services Best Doctors Best Doctors are committed to helping you make the right medical decision with confidence. Dr Devendra Richhariya Associate Director Jennifer Frank Cosmetic Surgeon Thomas Marshal Cardiology All Doctors Patient’s Feedback Measuring patients' experiences of care and treatment highlights areas that need to improve to provide a patient-led healthcare service. Vikas Saxena Best hospital which provide good service on reasonable rate."Aastha Hospital is a state-of-the-art Multi Speciality facility. Pankaj Verma "It's a good place for treatment in New Mahavir Nagar location."Aastha Hospital is a state-of-the-art Multi Speciality facility. Sourabh Kalra All staff is very co-operative and feel like homely enviornment .Aastha Hospital is a state-of-the-art Multi Speciality facility.
